title: memora fallax
intro: Memora fallax is a type of plant, although it is more commonly known as False Unicorn Root, which is a perennial plant native to North America. The medicinal properties of False Unicorn Root include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of consuming False Unicorn Root include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve fertility, and soothe coughs. Herbal preparations of False Unicorn Root often involve drying and grinding the roots, then using them in teas, tinctures, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
